---
id: import-keys-2
title: "Import keys"
description: "Imports new keys with translations. If key already exists, its translations and tags are not updated."
sidebar_label: "Import keys"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Import keys"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/keys/import"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Imports new keys with translations. If key already exists, its translations and tags are not updated.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
